description: For a striking and professional approach to promoting your business services within the home goods, marketing and design sectors, this email template delivers a bold and edgy aesthetic. Ideal for showcasing the work of interior designers and architects, its minimalistic style lets your design work shine. The stark contrast between black and white creates a dark, dramatic atmosphere that draws the eye to your home decor projects. With dedicated spaces for photos, you can highlight your design expertise and the unique style of your projects. The template also includes a 'contact us' feature, making it easy for potential clients to reach out and start their design journey with you. Perfect for those who appreciate minimal yet impactful design.
short_description: Promote your business services with this minimalistic and bold email template. Ideal for interior designers and architects within the home goods and design sectors. Highlight your work with dedicated photo spaces, contrasting black and white aesthetics and an easy 'contact us' feature. Start your client's design journey today.

designer.description: I've started to use Photoshop when I was 13. From 2009 to 2014, I've been a part of 5 Art Groups, doing Illustrations and Photo-manipulations, collaborating with over 150 Artists from all the Planet. In 2014, during my final school's exams, I've got my first Freelance Job at a Milan based Agency. Thanks to that first project, I started my Career as a Freelance Independent UI & Web Designer. Today, I help brands improve their online and digital presence, building usable, unique & beautiful products, mostly collaborating with Italian & US Agencies and Startups.
